summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ServiVizinhos app - a job/services marketplace clone. All core features working correctly including multi-step registration, JWT authentication, feed page, and 3-column messages page.

integration_issues.issue: When login fails with wrong credentials, the modal closes instead of showing error message. The error state is set but modal closes before user sees it.

issues: Console warning: DialogContent requires DialogTitle for accessibility (screen readers). Consider adding VisuallyHidden DialogTitle.

action_items: MINOR: Fix login modal to stay open and display error message when credentials are wrong
MINOR: Add DialogTitle (can be visually hidden) to Dialog components for accessibility
critical_code_review_comments: Messages/conversations data in Mensagens.jsx is MOCKED - not connected to backend API
Posts in Home.jsx feed are MOCKED - not connected to backend API
Good use of data-testid attributes throughout the app for testing

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all major flows working, minor login error display issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All auth flows (register/login/logout) working with real JWT backend. Messages and Posts are MOCKED data in frontend. Protected routes correctly redirect unauthenticated users to landing page.

landing_page.details: Landing page loads correctly at / for unauthenticated users with logo, hero section, login/register buttons

details.step1: Shows 3 account type options (Particular, Autônomo, Empresa)
details.autonomo_flow: Step 2 shows Nome Comercial field only
details.empresa_flow: Step 2 shows Nome Comercial + Nome/Sobrenome do Dirigente

registration_api.details: Registration submits to /api/auth/register and redirects to /feed on success

login_modal.details: Login works and redirects to /feed. Minor: error message not visible when credentials wrong (modal closes)

feed_page.details: Shows post cards with Curtir/Recomendar/Responder buttons, themed categories with images, sidebar with posting form and 'Arredonde sua renda' card

messages_page.details: 3-column layout working: conversation list, chat area, profile sidebar. Action buttons (Recusar, Agendar, Pagamento, Ver tudo) present. Message input works.

header_user_menu.details: User avatar shows dropdown with profile options and logout

logout.details: Logout clears session and redirects to landing page

protected_routes.details: /feed and /mensagens redirect to / when not authenticated

mocked_data_note: IMPORTANT: Messages/conversations and Posts/feed data are MOCKED in frontend components (Mensagens.jsx, Home.jsx). Backend auth is REAL with JWT tokens.
